title: Assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§893.  Assistant district attorney

The office of the first assistant district attorney for the Thirty-Eighth Judicial District of Louisiana is created.  

Added by Acts 1981, No. 694, §2, eff. July 20, 1981.
doc_text:
§893.  Assistant district attorney
